entry.title: Major service disruption affecting website, platform, and API
entry.content:
<!-- status-incident started_at: 2026-05-19T23:03:00Z resolved_at: 2026-05-20T02:28:00Z -->
A major service disruption affected website, platform, API, and model services after an upstream infrastructure provider outage.
Timeline (Pacific time): - May 19, 2026, 4:03 PM: Website, platform, and API were reported down while the provider outage was investigated. - May 19, 2026, 7:28 PM: Services were reported as gradually coming back online. - May 20, 2026, 8:15 AM: A follow-up update confirmed services should be fully restored.
This incident was backfilled from the operational updates posted at the time. The incident window uses the confirmed down report through the first recovery update, rather than the later follow-up confirmation.
